mapper.select: SELECT ar.approval_id, ar.request_type_code, ar.requester_admin_id, req.name AS requester_name, ar.target_id, ar.status_code, ar.request_comment, ar.requested_at, ar.completed_at, -- 카드명/약관명 JOIN (request_type_code 기준) CASE ar.request_type_code WHEN 'CARD_PUBLISH' THEN c.card_name WHEN 'CARD_UPDATE' THEN c.card_name WHEN 'TERMS_PUBLISH'THEN tm.title ELSE NULL END AS target_name, al.approval_line_id, al.approval_id AS line_approval_id, al.approver_admin_id, apv.name AS approver_name, al.approval_order, al.status_code AS line_status_code, al.comment_text, al.approved_at FROM APPROVAL_REQUESTS ar LEFT JOIN ADMIN_USERS req ON ar.requester_admin_id = req.admin_id LEFT JOIN APPROVAL_LINES al ON ar.approval_id = al.approval_id LEFT JOIN ADMIN_USERS apv ON al.approver_admin_id = apv.admin_id -- target_id = version_id → card_id → card_name LEFT JOIN CARD_VERSIONS cv ON ar.target_id = cv.version_id AND ar.request_type_code IN ('CARD_PUBLISH','CARD_UPDATE') LEFT JOIN CARDS c ON cv.card_id = c.card_id -- target_id = terms_id → terms_master_id → title LEFT JOIN TERMS t ON ar.target_id = t.terms_id AND ar.request_type_code = 'TERMS_PUBLISH' LEFT JOIN TERMS_MASTERS tm ON t.terms_master_id = tm.terms_master_id WHERE ar.approval_id = #{approvalId} ORDER BY al.approval_order ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_APPROVAL_REQUESTS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO APPROVAL_REQUESTS ( request_type_code, requester_admin_id, target_id, status_code, request_comment, requested_at ) VALUES ( #{requestTypeCode}, #{requesterAdminId}, #{targetId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 'PENDING', #{requestComment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN status_code = 'PENDING' THEN 1 END) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM APPROVAL_LINES WHERE approval_id = #{approvalId}
SELECT cv.snapshot_json FROM CARD_VERSIONS cv INNER JOIN APPROVAL_REQUESTS ar ON cv.version_id = ar.target_id WHERE ar.approval_id = #{approvalId}

SELECT cv.version_id, cv.card_id, cv.version_no, cv.version_status, cv.snapshot_json FROM CARD_VERSIONS cv INNER JOIN APPROVAL_REQUESTS ar ON cv.version_id = ar.target_id WHERE ar.approval_id = #{approvalId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM APPROVAL_REQUESTS WHERE status_code = 'PENDING'
